narrative:
Precinct Yellow Creek Twp (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,293 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
